_meta.purpose: Standing registry of every biological/structural assumption across the T1D models. Each entry is tagged with role, status, controversy, evidence, and the model parameters it governs. `validate.py` reads this to print a dig-here queue and to surface candidate BLIND SPOTS (model parameters with no catalogued assumption). Update this whenever a model gains a parameter or an assumption is checked.
_meta.honest_limit: This catches assumptions WRITTEN-but-uncatalogued (uncovered params), and CATALOGUED-but-unchecked. It CANNOT catch assumptions missing from the conceptual frame entirely (true unknown-unknowns) -- those need external expert critique + broad literature sweeps. Microscope, not oracle.

assumptions.statement: anti-CD3 preferentially deletes OR anergizes the activated/converting cells
assumptions.evidence: AICD principle; Wallberg 2017 (anti-CD3 -> PD-1 up, impairs activated effectors); Mathieu 2023 exhausted-CD8. Refined delete->delete-or-anergize.

assumptions.statement: protective regulatory clones are sparse (so stochastic extinction matters)
assumptions.evidence: Mhanna 2021 (amTreg clonal expansion limiting); Yang 2022 (antigen-specific Tregs 'extremely low'); Fuchs 2017 (autoreactive CD8 TCR-restricted).

assumptions.statement: antigen-specific tolerance protects via bystander/IL-10 (infectious) suppression
assumptions.evidence: Kleijwegt & Roep 2013 (infectious tolerance in T1D); Yeh 2017, Yang 2022 (bystander suppression).

assumptions.statement: antigen-specific tolerance acts on HIGH-avidity clones
assumptions.evidence: Contested: Santamaria pMHC-NP expands LOW-avidity autoregulatory cells; Turner 2009 (Treg induction driven by DOSE not avidity); Jing 2023 (Treg function affinity-disengaged). BUT result robustness-tested: antagonism holds at high AND low avidity (t1d_clonal_robust.py).

assumptions.statement: antigen-specific tolerance MONOTHERAPY is weak/partial alone
assumptions.evidence: reviewer critique; Mathieu 2023 (AG019 mono stabilized only ~6mo).

assumptions.statement: a transient conversion WINDOW exists, long enough for anti-CD3 to intercept
assumptions.evidence: RESOLVED on timescale grounds (conversion_window.md): effector->Treg conversion is MULTI-DAY (Foxp3 induction kinetics -- Selvaraj & Geiger 2007 J Immunol; TGF-b conversion of naive T cells -- Mucida 2009 Immunity), NOT near-instant; teplizumab acts over a ~2-week course -> a co-dosed course OVERLAPS the conversion window and can intercept the converters. The kill-shot (near-instant conversion -> no window) is ruled out. Residual: direct in-vivo islet overlap not measured (timescale-plausible only). Model-robust across window widths (t1d_clonal_robust.py).

assumptions.statement: anti-CD3 induces a durable, waning hyporesponsiveness (exhaustion) imprint
assumptions.evidence: Long 2016 (partial CD8 exhaustion predicts teplizumab response); Lledo-Delgado (persists ~18mo).

assumptions.statement: beta cells regenerate logistically
assumptions.evidence: Regeneration limited in established human T1D; partially mitigated in t1d_betacell.py by the recoverable dedifferentiated pool (Moin 2019).

assumptions.statement: regulatory suppression is GLOBAL/bystander (not local/contact-dependent)
assumptions.evidence: Cycle2 scan inconclusive. Low downside: if suppression were LOCAL, clone-loss is LESS buffered -> would STRENGTHEN the antagonism, not threaten it.

assumptions.statement: tolerance platforms split into CONVERSION (substrate-dependent) vs EXPANSION (substrate-independent IL-10/TGF-b)
assumptions.evidence: Reproduces BOTH Foster 2025 (mRNA/conversion -> antagonism) AND Mathieu 2023 (IL-10/expansion -> no antagonism). FINDINGS_clonal Platform axis.

assumptions.statement: teplizumab response = durable-exhaustion vs TSCM-renewal balance
assumptions.evidence: Reproduces BOTH response biomarkers: baseline exhaustion->responder (Wiedeman 2019); TSCM->non-responder (Dufort 2026).

assumptions.statement: baseline exhausted-CD8 is a PERSISTENT patient trait (a floor, not a wash-out IC)
assumptions.evidence: Wiedeman 2019 (baseline exhausted-CD8 signature predicts response).

assumptions.statement: explicit progenitor(TCF1)->effector->terminal-exhausted(TOX) hierarchy
assumptions.evidence: Long 2016; Grebinoski 2022 (LAG3-maintained exhaustion restrains intra-islet CD8); Vignali 2018 (autoreactive TSCM detected in patients).

assumptions.statement: checkpoint blockade REVERSES protective exhaustion (-> unleashes autoimmunity)
assumptions.evidence: VALIDATED against the documented clinical fact that checkpoint inhibitors CAUSE type 1 diabetes.

assumptions.statement: the progenitor (TSCM/Tpex) pool size is the responder/non-responder axis
assumptions.evidence: Deepens AR1; progenitor is a measurable population (Vignali 2018). Hypothesis the model generates (testable: does response track baseline autoreactive-TSCM frequency?).

assumptions.statement: beta-cell STRESS feeds back to AMPLIFY the attack (HLA/neoantigen) -- a self-amplifying loop
assumptions.evidence: Sahin&Engin 2021 (accomplice>victim); Colli 2020 / Carre 2025 (IFN-a -> HLA-I + neoantigens); Vig 2022 (ER stress -> IFN/IL-8).

assumptions.statement: beta-cell FRAGILITY is a 2nd, immune-independent patient axis
assumptions.evidence: Dooley 2016 (genetic immune-independent beta-cell fragility). NOTE: P4 fragility-stratification did NOT cleanly emerge (honest non-result).

assumptions.statement: dedifferentiation (Bf->Bd) is RECOVERABLE, not death
assumptions.evidence: Moin&Butler 2019; Nimkulrat 2021 (beta-cell dedifferentiation in T1D).

assumptions.statement: beta-protection + immunotherapy are ORTHOGONAL -> safe, non-antagonistic combination
assumptions.evidence: Premise VALIDATED: verapamil preserves beta-cell function via TXNIP/beta-cell stress (Ovalle 2018 Nat Med; CLVer/Forlenza 2023 JAMA) -- a genuinely ORTHOGONAL (non-immune) axis. Combination RATIONALE is the field's explicit strategy ('ideal combination therapy targeting multiple immunometabolic pathways', Pinheiro 2024); no mechanism or data suggests antagonism. RESIDUAL: no completed verapamil + immunotherapy head-to-head trial yet -> the model's specific 'safe/non-antagonistic' prediction is well-motivated but clinically UNCONFIRMED (a clean registered prediction).

assumptions.statement: STRUCTURAL: immune cell-fate is a bistable n-Hill switch (toggle)
assumptions.evidence: RESOLVED two ways: (1) bistable T-cell fate is well-supported -- Tbet/GATA3 mutual-antagonism toggle (Kanhere 2012), Teff/Treg lineage commitment (Delgoffe 2009), bistable cell-fate circuits (Schroter 2015) [immune_bistability.md]. (2) MODEL ROBUSTNESS (t1d_switch_robust.py): the responder result's two validated biomarker directions hold across switch steepness nH=1..8 INCLUDING the non-bistable n=1 (graded) case -> the result does NOT hinge on bistability or a specific n -- the OPPOSITE of the withdrawn v1's n-fragility (which reversed at n>=3). Residual: tested on the responder model (most-validated); hierarchy/betacell share the same n-Hill structure (representative); full per-model sweep not done.

assumptions.statement: STRUCTURAL: cohort heterogeneity is captured by a single severity / one-or-two patient knobs
assumptions.evidence: Simplification: real heterogeneity is multifactorial (genetics, microbiome, neutrophil-signature -- Sassi 2025 -- not modeled). Outcomes framed as cohort fractions.

assumptions.statement: STRUCTURAL: T-cell-centric core EXPANDED -- B cells (t1d_bcell) + innate (t1d_innate) now added; only the environmental trigger (microbiome/virus) still excluded
assumptions.evidence: LARGELY ADDRESSED: B cells/autoantibodies (BC1) AND innate immunity/neutrophils/IFN-a (AI1) now modeled. Remaining out of scope: the environmental CAUSE of the initial innate trigger (virus, gut microbiome) -- only its downstream innate response is modeled. A much-narrowed, deliberate conceptual-frame boundary.

assumptions.statement: standard within-host kinetic constants (baseline influx, death/turnover, self-activation half-saturations, thymic-escape prior)
assumptions.evidence: Standard mass-action within-host immune kinetics (Perelson/Nowak-May lineage); magnitudes illustrative. Robustness-checked against intervention rates and switch steepness (AUDIT.md; t1d_clonal_robust.py); results do not hinge on these individually.

assumptions.statement: per-effector beta-cell KILL RATE (kappa) -- sets the disease TIMESCALE
assumptions.evidence: CALIBRATED (fit, not tuned) to TN10 (Herold 2019, NEJM): kappa=0.60/yr reproduces the placebo median onset 24.4 mo (calib_tn10.py / verify_calib.py 5/5); the anti-CD3 effect reproducing the teplizumab median 48.4 mo is a ~24% effective attack reduction. IDENTIFIABILITY (honest): the median pins the disease TIMESCALE and the product kappa x E (E normalized=1), NOT kappa alone -- kappa = 0.50-0.70/yr across the B0/B_clin enrollment-threshold assumptions. The timescale is the data-anchored quantity; it sets magnitude/time-axis, not the qualitative results (robust to it).

assumptions.statement: epitope SPREADING is hierarchical + stress-driven (neoantigens); single-antigen tolerance is escaped by it
assumptions.evidence: Spreading is hierarchical/staged (TEDDY -- Vehik 2020; Ilonen 2013), driven by beta-cell-stress neoantigens (Marre 2015; Strollo 2022) -- same stress family as AB1. Single-antigen tolerance is escaped by neo/spread epitopes (Balakrishnan 2020; Peakman & Santamaria 2024). CROSS-LAYER: beta-protection (AB4) lowers stress -> fewer neoantigens -> slows spreading -> rescues single-antigen tolerance (FINDINGS_spreading P4). NOTE: 'sequential' + 'stress-threshold-gated' spreading are modeling ABSTRACTIONS (medium controversy on structure); the qualitative directions + the #antigens mechanism follow from spreading existing at all (robust). CALIBRATED (calib_teddy / verify_calib_teddy 5/5): the spreading TIMESCALE is now FIT to the Ziegler 2013 (JAMA) / TEDDY natural history -- spreading rate ~0.04/yr (single->multiple), multiple-Ab->clinical hazard ~0.12/yr (median ~5.8 yr), reproducing 44/70/84% @5/10/15yr + single-Ab 14.5%@10yr within 1pp; clinical progression REQUIRES spreading (h1=0 fits). Spreading magnitudes are no longer only illustrative -- the empirical rate is anchored (a slow pre-clinical clock, complementary to kappa's ~2yr final approach).

assumptions.statement: B cells are APCs that SUSTAIN the autoreactive attack + DRIVE spreading; T effectors persist (memory) -> anti-CD20 is TRANSIENT
assumptions.evidence: Anti-CD20 (rituximab) preserves C-peptide then WANES by 2yr (Pescovitz 2009 NEJM 1011 cites; Pescovitz 2014 Diabetes Care) -- transience reproduced because rituximab targets B-not-T (effectors persist, B cells repopulate; Chamberlain 2016 = tolerance not reset). B cells as APC sustain the T-cell attack (Herold 2011) + drive determinant spreading (McLaughlin 2015; Wan 2018 Nature). RESPONDER axis: fails when T-dominated (Linsley 2018). NOTE: 'B-help scales the kill, effectors persist' + stylized repopulation timescale are modeling choices; the qualitative directions (transient / responder / combo>either) are robust. CALIBRATED (calib_pescovitz / verify_calib_pescovitz 5/5): r_bc~4.7/yr reproduces Pescovitz B-cell recovery (69%@12mo, baseline@18mo); B-cell-dependence Tdom~0.18 reproduces the observed 8.2-month C-peptide SHIFT (Pescovitz 2014) -- Tdom~0.18 matches the layer's illustrative 0.20 (consistency) and the ~82%-B-cell-dependent 'responders are B-driven' axis (Linsley 2018). The transience is a FINITE shift (curves run parallel after) -> anti-CD20 needs a durable partner.

assumptions.statement: beta-MASS -> C-peptide via REVERSIBLE stress-suppressed function; GLUCOTOXICITY (hyperglycemia) feeds the stress hub
assumptions.evidence: Glucotoxicity -> oxidative/ER stress -> beta-dysfunction (Gerber & Rutter 2017, 572 cites) -- the SAME stress that mediates autoimmune beta-destruction (Dinic 2022). C-peptide = mass x reversible function reproduces the HONEYMOON (Mortensen 2009 IDAA1c) and the C-peptide-vs-glycemia DISSOCIATION. Glucose control is a MODEST lever alone -- honest match to McVean/CLVer 2023 (tight control did NOT robustly preserve C-peptide). NOTE: quasi-steady glucose + threshold glucotoxicity are abstractions; C-peptide is in MODEL UNITS; directions are robust. HONEST SUB-RESULT: glucose+immunotherapy is ADDITIVE, not super-additive (independent levers) -- reported as-is, not tuned into a synergy. CALIBRATED + CROSS-VALIDATED (calib_cpeptide / verify_calib_cpeptide 4/4): C-peptide decline anchored to Shields 2018 (47%/yr, half-life 1.10yr); its rate (0.63/yr) independently MATCHES the TN10-calibrated kappa (0.60/yr, within 6%) -- the late-disease kill rate confirmed by TWO unrelated datasets; and the TN10 anti-CD3 effect (24%, stage 2) TRANSFERS to predict the PROTECT (Ramos 2023, NEJM) stage-3 C-peptide preservation (model 0.10 vs PROTECT ~0.16 fractional) -- a cross-stage prediction, not a fit.

assumptions.statement: INNATE inflammation (neutrophils/NETs/IFN-a) is the UPSTREAM trigger: it PRIMES the adaptive attack (bistable -> self-sustaining once ignited) and feeds the stress hub
assumptions.evidence: IFN-a is the innate PRIMING trigger (Lombardi 2018) and drives beta HLA-I + ER stress (Marroqui 2017 -- the AB1 hub). Neutrophils/NETosis associated with beta-autoimmunity (Wang 2014 Diabetes 181 cites). The bistable EARLY-WINDOW prediction EXPLAINS why anti-IL-1 failed at clinical onset (Moran 2013 Lancet 342 cites; Cabrera 2016 -- moderated inflammation but did NOT preserve C-peptide) and predicts it works as PREVENTION. NOTE: the sharp Hill ignition threshold + the lumped innate compartment are abstractions; the early-window DIRECTION is the robust output, not the exact threshold timing.

assumptions.statement: GENOTYPE -> autoreactive-escape PARAMETER (anchored in REAL HLA odds ratios) sets ignition speed -> onset age + endotype (the CALIBRATION BRIDGE)
assumptions.evidence: Genotype OR -> escape map uses REAL published effect sizes (Erlich 2008 T1DGC: DR3/DR4-DQ2/8 OR=30; DR15-DQ6 OR=0.03 protective) and REPRODUCES known genotype->phenotype facts NOT fit to: higher OR/GRS -> younger onset (Sharp 2019 GRS2, AUC 0.92), DQ6 protection (Erlich), insulin-first(DR4)/GAD-first(DR3) endotype (Bauer 2019). verify_genetics.py 4/4. HONEST LIMIT: SEMI-quantitative (real aggregate ORs -> reproduced ORDERING), NOT individual-level GRS fitting (controlled-access data not used); the OR->parameter map is itself a modeling choice; onset ages model-scaled (ordering/protection robust, absolute ages illustrative). The first plank of calibration -- free knobs -> genotype-anchored knobs.
